title: Rename 'Cleaning' to 'Machine Part' throughout the app

requirements.text: Rename all user-facing occurrences of 'cleaning' (and its variants: 'Cleaning', 'CLEANING', 'cleaning tool', 'Cleaning Tool', 'cleaning done', 'Cleaning Done', 'last cleaned', 'Last Cleaned', 'next due', 'Machine Cleaning Tracker', etc.) to use 'Machine Part' terminology throughout the frontend UI. For example: 'Cleaning Tool' → 'Machine Part', 'Cleaning Done' → 'Machine Part Done', 'Last Cleaned' → 'Last Replaced', 'Next Due' → 'Next Due', page title 'Machine Cleaning Tracker' → 'Machine Part Tracker', button labels, card labels, modal titles, form field labels, banner text, and stats bar labels must all reflect the new naming.

quotes: change name cleaning to Machine part

acceptanceCriteria: No user-visible text contains the word 'cleaning' or 'Cleaning' anywhere in the UI
All form fields, modal headers, card labels, and button text use 'Machine Part' or equivalent renamed terminology
The page/app title reflects 'Machine Part' instead of 'Cleaning'
The 'Cleaning Tool' field label is renamed to 'Machine Part' in AddMachineModal, EditMachineModal, MachineFormFields, and MachineCard
The 'Cleaning Done' button on MachineCard is renamed to 'Part Done' or 'Machine Part Done'
The overdue alert banner and stats bar use updated terminology

requirements.text: Update the backend Motoko actor in backend/main.mo to rename the cleaningTool field and any related type variants or labels from 'cleaning' terminology to 'machinePart' or equivalent, ensuring consistency with the frontend rename.

quotes: change name cleaning to Machine part

acceptanceCriteria: The Machine type field previously named cleaningTool is renamed to machinePart (or equivalent) in the Motoko actor
All CRUD operations referencing the old field name are updated accordingly
The backend compiles without errors after the rename

constraints: Do not alter any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not change any functional logic — only rename labels and field names
nonGoals: Adding new features or changing any business logic
Redesigning the UI layout or visual theme
